title: zeia
intro: Zeia is a plant that belongs to the family of Polygonaceae and is commonly known as the "Persian rhubarb". The medicinal properties of Zeia lie in its high concentration of anthraquinones, which are powerful laxatives and have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Zeia include the treatment of digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps. Zeia can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tinctures, or it can be consumed as a tea, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
